---
title: "Spolupráce, investice a silná centra. Reforma RUD může zlepšit život v regionech"
date: 2025-11-11
description: "Analysis of Czech municipal tax revenue distribution with proposals for reform to better support regional development."
categories: [publication, second author, literature]
---

This study looks at how tax revenues are distributed to Czech municipalities and identifies five structural problems with the current system — from underfunded regional centers to weak incentives for inter-municipal cooperation. We propose both short-term parametric fixes and a longer-term systemic overhaul. My work here focused on the quantitative modeling of redistribution scenarios.

[Read the original study →](https://www.paqresearch.cz/post/spoluprace-investice-a-silna-centra/)
